revision.text: {{Portal|Religion}} *'''{{C|Buddhist temples}}''' built in the '''{{C|9th century}}'''. {{Navseasoncats}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Uncategorized categories]] [[Category:9th-century Buddhism|Temples]] [[Category:Buddhist temples by century| 09]] [[Category:9th-century religious buildings and structures| +Buddhist temples]] }} [[sn:9th-century Buddhist temples]] [[Category:Categories with 3 members]] [[en:Category:9th-century Buddhist temples]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]
